parameters.query: SELECT id, slug, name, status FROM public.tenants WHERE slug = '{{ $json.tenant_slug }}' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO public.sources (tenant_id, name, source_type, origin_url, file_name, file_type, status, created_by, tags, metadata) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.source_type }}', {{ $json.origin_url ? "'" + $json.origin_url + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.file_name }}', '{{ $json.file_type }}', 'processing', 'n8n-demo-ingestion', ARRAY[{{ $json.tags.map(t => "'" + t + "'").join(',') }}]::text[], '{}') RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO public.documents (tenant_id, source_id, title, doc_type, language, word_count, char_count) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.source_id }}', '{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.doc_type }}', 'de', {{ Math.round($json.char_count / 5) }}, {{ $json.char_count }}) RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO public.chunks (tenant_id, document_id, source_id, chunk_index, content, char_count) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.document_id }}', '{{ $json.source_id }}', {{ $json.chunk_index }}, {{ $escapeString($json.content) }}, {{ $json.char_count }}) RETURNING id;
INSERT INTO public.embeddings (tenant_id, chunk_id, model_name, embedding) VALUES ('{{ $json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.chunk_db_id }}', 'qwen3-embedding:0.6b', '{{ $json.embedding }}'::vector(1024));
UPDATE public.sources SET status='indexed', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.source_id }}';

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, source_id: $json.source_id, chunks: $json.total_chunks, tenant: $json.tenant_slug }) }}
